text: My credit card was charged twice for the April subscription. Please refund the duplicate.

Please add a dark mode toggle in the settings menu.
I cannot log in since the password-reset email never arrives.

I want a prorated refund because I cancelled 3 days after renewal.

Random feedback — the new logo looks great.

Just wanted to say hi to the team, no issue.

Please add keyboard shortcut support (j/k to navigate tickets).

Pagination over 10k rows returns results in 15s — can you add indexes?

Love the new onboarding flow, much cleaner than before.
